\tzpentry{ID11384}{Curvature Radius From OmegaK}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The curvature radius is c divided by H0 times the square root of the absolute curvature parameter.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
R_{c}=\frac{c}{H_{0}\sqrt{|\Omega_{K}|}}
